title: Polymarket ingestion + asset-crossing trend study (research spike)
source: CEO request 2026-06-12: Polymarket is becoming a valuable info source — verify we can get its data and cross it with our assets to look for trends. Hackathon rules explicitly allow prediction-market data.
why: Feasibility verified by live API probes 2026-06-12: Gamma + CLOB /prices-history are free and keyless; events carry a `series` field (e.g. fomc) enabling futures-style stitching of episodic markets into a continuous Fed-cut-odds series — the most direct XAU/DXY driver we lack. Resolved markets only serve >=12h fidelity, so the live Jun-16/17 FOMC market must be archived at 1h fidelity BEFORE it resolves. History depth (weeks-months per market) is too short for the multi-year walk-forward, hence research spike, not pipeline integration.
value_rationale: M: new orthogonal macro driver with a hard hackathon-relevant deadline (FOMC Jun 16-17 inside prep week), but unproven signal value and explicitly out of the frozen-strategy path.
scope: configs/polymarket.yaml — watchlist (fomc series + cuts-2026 event), fidelities
scripts/ingest_polymarket.py — Gamma discovery + /prices-history pull + parquet cache + manifest; idempotent; live markets re-pulled at fid 60 (the archiver)
pipeline/alt_data/polymarket.py — stitched continuous series (cut/nochange/hike prob, entropy, roll tags, coverage) + PIT loader (calendar-day shift, ffill limit=5)
scripts/spike_polymarket_trends.py — pre-registered lead-lag (BH-corrected) + FOMC event study vs XAU/EURUSD/USDJPY/BTC -> results/feasibility/polymarket_trends.{json,md}
tests: mocked-HTTP ingest tests + stitch/PIT tests (no network)
out_of_scope: Wiring pm_* into tier2/meta-model (CEO decision, post-spike); any live gate/overlay on the survival book (CEO-reserved, freeze Jun 21 22:00 BST); websocket streaming; additional series beyond config edits.

history.reason: Plan approved by CEO 2026-06-12 (plan file: polymarket-se-esta-volviendo-abundant-toucan.md). Feasibility pre-verified via live API probes; spike bounded to ~1 engineer-day.
feat(B0169): pooled selection/confirmatory/gate per section-7 amendment (TDD, +60 tests)

Spike complete. Built: configs/polymarket.yaml, scripts/ingest_polymarket.py (keyless Gamma+CLOB, idempotent, live markets merge fine-60min recent + coarse-720min full-life backfill — CLOB caps interval=max at fine fidelity to ~1 trailing month, found empirically), pipeline/alt_data/polymarket.py (futures-style stitcher + PIT loader, calendar-day shift, bounded ffill), scripts/spike_polymarket_trends.py (pre-registered criteria). Cache: 97 markets, 19 FOMC events (16 resolved) 2024-05->2026-06. RESULTS: lead-lag NULL after BH (132 cells, 0 survivors k>=+1; strongest raw cells are reverse-causal k=-1); event study XAUUSD 79% sign agreement (n=14, binom p=0.029, Bonferroni x4 = 0.116 — suggestive, NOT family-wise significant); EURUSD/USDJPY/BTCUSD null. 33 new tests; full suite 2143 passed. Follow-ups -> B0172.
All five scope items delivered; verdict recorded; follow-ups spawned as B0172.
